rows.label: Resolution
rows.tooltip: Changes the resolution.

rows.label: Display Mode
rows.tooltip: Sets the display mode.

rows.label: Antialiasing
rows.tooltip: Specifies the antialiasing (AA) applied to edges to make them smoother and less jagged.

rows.label: Default World FOV
rows.tooltip: Sets the default world field of view.

rows.label: Default FOV
rows.tooltip: Sets the default field of view.

rows.label: Default 1st Person FOV
rows.tooltip: Sets the default 1st person field of view.

rows.label: Always Active
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability of the game to remain active when it is out of focus (i.e. if in a windowed mode setup, if one clicks outside the game window with this enabled, the game will not pause).

rows.label: 64-Bit Render Targets
rows.tooltip: Toggles 64-bit render targets. Disabling this can cause a significant performance boost with very little visual difference. Basically it is a more precise method of rendering that reduces banding artifacts.

rows.label: VSync
rows.tooltip: Toggles vertical synchronization (VSync), which removes screen tearing.

rows.label: Lock Frame Rate
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability for the game to lock the frame rate to 60 frames per second.

rows.label: Havok FPS
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum framerate supported by game physics.

rows.label: Text Language
rows.tooltip: Sets the language used for text elements.

rows.label: Intro Logos
rows.tooltip: Toggles the game intro logos.

rows.label: Intro Music
rows.tooltip: Toggles the game intro music.

rows.label: Show Markers
rows.tooltip: Toggles markers useful for modders. Do NOT use for actual gameplay'

rows.label: Max Cached Sound Size
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum size for cached sound.

rows.label: Autosaves
rows.tooltip: Toggles autosaves.

rows.label: Max Autosaves
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of autosaves to keep.

rows.label: Save on Pause
rows.tooltip: Toggles autosaves made upon closing certain menus that pause the game.

rows.label: Save on Pause Timer
rows.tooltip: Sets the timer to make a new autosave upon closing certain menus that pause the game.

rows.label: Save on Travel
rows.tooltip: Toggles autosaves made after traveling to different locations.

rows.label: Save on Rest
rows.tooltip: Toggles autosaves made after sleeping.

rows.label: Save on Wait
rows.tooltip: Toggles autosaves made after waiting.

rows.label: Missing Content Warning
rows.tooltip: Toggles the missing content warning when loading a saved game missing a previously enabled plugin.

rows.label: Scripted Autosaves
rows.tooltip: Toggles scripted autosaves.

rows.label: Scripted Force Saves
rows.tooltip: Toggles scripted force saves.

rows.label: Compression
rows.tooltip: Sets the type of compression used on the save game file.

rows.label: Post-Load Update Time
rows.tooltip: Sets time, in milliseconds, given to scripts to update after loading.

rows.label: Max Allocated Memory
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum memory that Papyrus can hold at a time.

rows.label: Logging
rows.tooltip: Toggles Papyrus logs being written to disk.

rows.label: Debug Info
rows.tooltip: Toggles additional debug information. If enabled, line number information will be available in error traces at the expense of higher memory usage.

rows.label: Profiling
rows.tooltip: Toggles script profiling, which enables profiling commands and allows profiling information to be logged, at the cost of some script performance.

rows.label: Tracing
rows.tooltip: Toggles script tracing.

rows.label: Screenshots Directory
rows.tooltip: Sets the location of game screenshots.

rows.label: Filename
rows.tooltip: Sets the base filename of game screenshots.

rows.label: Index
rows.tooltip: Sets the screenshot index number.

rows.label: Difficulty
rows.tooltip: Sets the difficulty level.

rows.label: Always Drive Ragdoll
rows.tooltip: Toggles always drive ragdoll. This makes ragdolls more animated when bumped.

rows.label: Always Run by Default
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability of the character to always run by default. If turned off, you can still run, but walking is the default action.

rows.label: Combat Dialogue
rows.tooltip: Toggles those cheeky comments that enemies say while in combat.

rows.label: Hit Recoil
rows.tooltip: Toggles hit recoil. Actors respond to being punched.

rows.label: NPCs Use Ammo
rows.tooltip: Toggles off unlimited NPC ammo. If enabled, NPCs will no longer have access to unlimited ammo, but shall be forced to only use the ammo they possess.

rows.label: Disable Kill Cam
rows.tooltip: Deactivates cinematic killmove camera. Kill moves will still work.

rows.label: Remove Borders
rows.tooltip: Toggles off the borders at the edges of the map.

rows.label: Tutorials
rows.tooltip: Toggles the in-game tutorial pop-ups.

rows.label: 1st Person Arrow Tilt-up Angle
rows.tooltip: Sets the upward tilt angle of arrows in 1st-person view.

rows.label: 3rd Person Arrow Tilt-up Angle
rows.tooltip: Sets the upward tilt angle of arrows in 3rd-person view.

rows.label: 1st Person Bolt Tilt-up Angle
rows.tooltip: Sets the upward tilt angle of crossbow bolts in 1st-person view.

rows.label: Max Arrow Range
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum distance that arrows can hit actors.

rows.label: Hit Recoil Multiplier
rows.tooltip: Sets the hit recoil multiplier.

rows.label: Weapon Change Clear Time
rows.tooltip: Sets the weapon change clear time.

rows.label: Over-Encumbered Reminder
rows.tooltip: Sets the time interval between subsequent "You are carrying too much to be able to run" messages in seconds.

rows.label: Landscape Friction
rows.tooltip: Sets the landscape friction.

rows.label: Book Open Time
rows.tooltip: Sets the time in milliseconds it takes to open books. 50 appears to be the minimum amount for you to still be able to read the book, but might vary.

rows.label: Horse Dismount Delay
rows.tooltip: Sets the time in milliseconds it takes for the camera to readjust after dismounting a horse.

rows.label: Subtitle Speaker Name Color
rows.tooltip: Sets the subtitle text color of the name of the person speaking.

rows.label: Dialogue Subtitles
rows.tooltip: Toggles subtitles for NPCs who are directly talking to you.

rows.label: General Subtitles
rows.tooltip: Toggles subtitles for NPCs who are not directly talking to you.

rows.label: Bethesda Modding Platform
rows.tooltip: Toggles Bethesda's built-in modding platform. If disabled, Creation Club news will no longer appear, but the "Mods" and "Creation Club" buttons will still be active, albeit probably broken.

rows.label: Mod Manager Menu
rows.tooltip: Toggles the "Mods" menu item in the in-game system menu.

rows.label: Controller Vibration
rows.tooltip: Toggles controller vibration.

rows.label: Max Custom Name Length
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of characters that can be used for custom names of items renamed during enchanting.

rows.label: Crosshair
rows.tooltip: Toggles the crosshair.

rows.label: Compass
rows.tooltip: Toggles the compass.

rows.label: HUD Opacity
rows.tooltip: Sets HUD opacity.

rows.label: Quest Markers
rows.tooltip: Toggles quest markers on the map and the compass.

rows.label: Floating Quest Markers
rows.tooltip: Toggles floating quest markers on items and characters.

rows.label: Screen Percentage
rows.tooltip: Sets the percentage of the screen that the in-game console can fill.

rows.label: Text Size
rows.tooltip: Sets the size for text in the in-game console.

rows.label: Buffer Size
rows.tooltip: Sets the console history buffer size.

rows.label: Text Input Color
rows.tooltip: Sets the color of text typed into the console.

rows.label: Text Output Color
rows.tooltip: Sets the color of the text output in the console.

rows.label: Unlock Map Menu Navigation
rows.tooltip: Unlocks the map menu navigation so that when the right mouse button is held, the camera can move more freely.

rows.label: Remove Map Blur
rows.tooltip: Removes blurring effects on the map menu.

rows.label: Map Brightness Boost
rows.tooltip: Sets the global brightness boost modifier for the map.

rows.label: Map Contrast Boost
rows.tooltip: Sets the global contrast boost modifier for the map.

rows.label: Map Bloom Boost
rows.tooltip: Sets the global bloom threshold boost modifier for the map.

rows.label: Invert Y
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability of the the mouse to be inverted over the y-axis (up and down movement).

rows.label: Look Sensitivity
rows.tooltip: Sets the look sensitivity (how fast the camera moves in response to the mouse).

rows.label: Cursor Velocity
rows.tooltip: Sets the velocity of the mouse cursor in menus, such as the inventory menu.

rows.label: X Scale
rows.tooltip: Sets the mouse horizontal scale value (how much the camera moves when moving the mouse horizontally).

rows.label: Y Scale
rows.tooltip: Sets the mouse vertical scale value (how much the camera moves when moving the mouse vertically).

rows.label: Mouse Wheel Zoom Speed
rows.tooltip: Sets the transition speed when zooming in and out in third person mode using the mouse wheel. This also affects how fast the transition from first to third person occurs.

rows.label: Projected UV Diffuse Normals
rows.tooltip: Toggles the use of projected UV diffuse normals. It is recommended to leave this enabled. Some mods missing the appropriate projecteddiffuse.dds texture can cause this feature to looked bugged.

rows.label: Improved Shader
rows.tooltip: Toggles the improved snow shader. Please note that "improved" is subjective in this case. It is recommended to be disabled in most cases.

rows.label: Snow Ambient Occlusion
rows.tooltip: Toggles ambient occlusion on snow.

rows.label: Snow Mask
rows.tooltip: Toggles the snow mask. This adds an effect to certain landscapes around snow.

rows.label: Sparkles
rows.tooltip: Toggles snow sparkles.

rows.label: Rim Lighting
rows.tooltip: Toggles snow rim lighting.

rows.label: Sparkle Intensity
rows.tooltip: Sets the intensity of snow sparkles.

rows.label: Sparkle Density
rows.tooltip: Sets the density of snow sparkles.

rows.label: Sparkle Size
rows.tooltip: Sets the size of snow sparkles.

rows.label: Rim Lighting Intensity
rows.tooltip: Sets the intensity of rim lighting.

rows.label: Rim Lighting Geometry Power
rows.tooltip: Sets the power of gloss/rim lighting on snow-covered geometry. Higher values are darker. Lower values are brighter.

rows.label: Rim Lighting Landscape
rows.tooltip: Sets the power of gloss/rim lighting on snow-covered landscape. Higher values are darker. Lower values are brighter.

rows.label: Fade-in
rows.tooltip: Toggles the gradual, fade-in effect for grass.

rows.label: Draw Grass
rows.tooltip: Toggles drawing grass.

rows.label: Create Grass
rows.tooltip: Toggles creating grass positions information.

rows.label: Load Grass GID
rows.tooltip:
Toggles loading grass from gid files.

ONLY TURN ON IF YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING.

Typically use No Grass In Objects mod for this functionality instead.

rows.label: Density
rows.tooltip: Sets the grass density.

rows.label: Diversity
rows.tooltip: Sets the grass diversity.

rows.label: Grass Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where grass starts to fade.

rows.label: Grass Fade Range
rows.tooltip: Sets the grass fade range distance.

rows.label: Minimum Wind
rows.tooltip: Sets the minimum wind magnitude blowing grass.

rows.label: Maximum Wind
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum wind magnitude blowing grass.

rows.label: Dynamic Trees
rows.tooltip: Toggles between dynamic and static tree model rendering.

rows.label: Disable Tree Animations
rows.tooltip: Toggles off tree animations.

rows.label: Skinned Trees
rows.tooltip: Toggles the rendering of enhanced tree detail.

rows.label: Max Skinned Trees
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of trees to render with enhanced tree detail.

rows.label: Skinned Trees Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance that trees have full skinned details. The trees switch to the lower quality SwitchNode mesh within the nif after this distance.

rows.label: Level 1 Tree Details
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 1 skinned tree detail fade distance.

rows.label: Level 2 Tree Details
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 2 skinned tree detail fade distance.

rows.label: Reflect Trees
rows.tooltip: Toggles tree reflections in the water.

rows.label: Reflect Land
rows.tooltip: Toggles land reflections in the water.

rows.label: Reflect Objects
rows.tooltip: Toggles object reflections in the water.

rows.label: Reflect Sky
rows.tooltip: Toggles the sky reflection in the water.

rows.label: Water SSR Blur
rows.tooltip: Sets the amount of blur on screen space reflections in water.

rows.label: Water SSR Intensity
rows.tooltip: Sets the intensity of screen space reflections in water.

rows.label: Water SSR Perturbation
rows.tooltip: Sets the perturbation scale of screen space reflections in water.

rows.label: Tree Shadows
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability of trees to cast shadows upon themselves.

rows.label: High Tree Shadows
rows.tooltip: Toggles high tree shadows.

rows.label: Land Shadows
rows.tooltip: Toggles the ability of land objects such as rocks and mountains to cast shadows.

rows.label: Shadow Resolution
rows.tooltip: Sets the resolution of shadows.

rows.label: Shadow Bias
rows.tooltip: Sets the directional bias of the shadows applied to surfaces. Low values reduce peter-panning (detached shadows), but cause more shadow acne (AKA shadow striping).

rows.label: Shadow Filtering
rows.tooltip: Sets the amount of shadow filtering.

rows.label: Detailed Draw Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the detailed draw distance (the shadows closest to your character).

rows.label: Exterior Draw Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the exterior shadow distance.

rows.label: Focus Shadows
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of objects to use very highly detailed shadows based on where you are looking.

rows.label: High Tree Shadow Limit
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum height that trees can cast high tree shadows.

rows.label: Ambient Occlusion
rows.tooltip: Toggles ambient occlusion.

rows.label: SAO Bias
rows.tooltip: Sets the SAO bias.

rows.label: SAO Exp Factor
rows.tooltip: Sets the SAO bias.

rows.label: SAO Intensity
rows.tooltip: Sets the SAO intensity.

rows.label: SAO Radius
rows.tooltip: Sets the SAO radio.

rows.label: SAO Value Diff Factor
rows.tooltip: Sets the SAO value diff factor.

rows.label: Sun Base Size
rows.tooltip: Sets sun base size.

rows.label: Sun Glare Size
rows.tooltip: Sets sun base size.

rows.label: Sun Boost
rows.tooltip: Sets the sun boost.

rows.label: Sun Glare Multiplier
rows.tooltip: Sets the sun glare multiplier.

rows.label: Decals
rows.tooltip: Toggles decals (mostly blood effects).

rows.label: Disable Gore
rows.tooltip: Toggles gory effects, such as blood.

rows.label: Max Decals Per Frame
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of decals that can be shown per frame.

rows.label: Max Skinned Decals
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals.

rows.label: Max Skinned Decals Per Frame
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals that can be shown per frame.

rows.label: Max Skinned Decals Per Actor
rows.tooltip: Sets the maximum number of skinned decals per actor.

rows.label: Decal Lifetime
rows.tooltip: Sets the time in seconds that some decals will stay visible.

rows.label: Decal Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance that some decals will show.

rows.label: Particles
rows.tooltip: Sets the amount of particle effects.

rows.label: Godrays
rows.tooltip: Sets Godrays (volumetric lighting) quality.

rows.label: Interior Godrays
rows.tooltip: Toggles Godrays in interiors. This may cause interiors to become overly bright in some cases.

rows.label: Lens Flare
rows.tooltip: Toggles lens flare.

rows.label: Anamorphic Lens Flare
rows.tooltip: Toggles the horizontal lens flare effect most commonly associated with anamorphic lenses.

rows.label: Rain Occlusion
rows.tooltip: Toggles precipitation occlusion (rain will not appear under roofs).

rows.label: Screen Space Reflections
rows.tooltip: Toggles screen space reflections.

rows.label: SSR Resolution Divider
rows.tooltip: Sets the resolution divider of screen space reflections.

rows.label: Depth of Field
rows.tooltip: Toggles depth of field (DOF), a kind of blurring to imitate the human eye's perception, in imagespace. This is most noticeable under water, reducing visibility to realistic levels (it looks clear otherwise). It is recommended to leave this enabled, as most of the bad depth of field is controlled by the DOF Multiplier below.

rows.label: DOF Multiplier
rows.tooltip: Sets the depth of field multiplier.

rows.label: Environment Map Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where the environment map starts to fade.

rows.label: Environment Map Fade End
rows.tooltip: Sets the environment map fade end distance.

rows.label: Refraction Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where refraction starts to fade.

rows.label: Refraction Fade End
rows.tooltip: Sets the refraction fade end distance.

rows.label: Specular Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where specularity starts to fade.

rows.label: Specular Fade End
rows.tooltip: Sets the specular fade end distance.

rows.label: Decal Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where decals start to fade.

rows.label: Decal Fade End
rows.tooltip: Sets the decal fade end distance.

rows.label: Light Fade Start
rows.tooltip: Sets the distance where light starts to fade

rows.label: Light Fade Range
rows.tooltip: Sets the light fade range distance.

rows.label: Level 1 Object Details
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 1 object detail fade distance.

rows.label: Level 2 Object Details
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 2 object detail fade distance.

rows.label: Actor Fade
rows.tooltip: Sets the actor fade distance

rows.label: Item Fade
rows.tooltip: Sets the item fade distance

rows.label: Object Fade
rows.tooltip: Sets the object fade distance

rows.label: Flickering Light Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the flickering light fade distance

rows.label: uGridsToLoad
rows.tooltip: Sets how many grids will be actively rendered and processed around the Player Character (PC).

rows.label: Level 4 Block Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 4 block distance. This is the distance that level 4 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 4 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

rows.label: Level 8 Block Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 8 block distance. This is the distance that level 8 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 8 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

rows.label: Level 16 Block Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the level 16 block distance. This is the distance that level 16 object LOD is shown. Additionally, level 16 terrain LOD is shown at this distance, but multiplied by the Terrain Multiplier (fSplitDistanceMult).

rows.label: Terrain Multiplier
rows.tooltip: Sets the terrain multiplier. This value gets multiplied by the block distances to determine the terrain LOD distance.

rows.label: Neverfade Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the neverfade distance.

rows.label: Tree LOD Distance
rows.tooltip: Sets the tree LOD distance. Set to 0 if using DynDOLOD Ultra trees in object LOD.

rows.label: Land Fade
rows.tooltip: Toggles terrain LOD fade. Recommended to be disabled to prevent flickering.

rows.label: Large Reference Grid
rows.tooltip: Sets how many grids full models for large references will show past the uGridsToLoad cells without the need to set the IsFullLOD flag
